lastReleaseMessage: v0.10.0: bar-raise drain (D-006 loopback bind, D-007 import/rollback strict backup-fail, error_log + logEvent, daily prune, regex hoist, analytics surface modules, dedup guard, dashboard preservation, drift-fix F1-F8); .finances/ removed from git index (D-001/D-002 enforcement)

barRaise.topFinding: All three open actions from the 2026-05-27 review are closed in code. audit-yab-daily is registered in Windows Task Scheduler, fired this morning at 05:30 with LastTaskResult 0, and produced docs/CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-05-28.md. The BACKLOG drift on chase-csv, amex-csv, and the analytics.ts physical extract is closed, apps/web now ships two vitests, and --passWithNoTests has retired from the package script. The new gap is downstream of the now-working audit loop: today's canonical audit produced four HIGH DESIGN-vs-code drift findings (subscription_flags column rename + PK shape, missing endpoints in DESIGN section 12) but nothing has consumed them yet, and the report file is still untracked in the working tree. Run drift-auto-fix once and most of it disappears.
